arts.ttl: Who will win Greece vs Scotland? Our writers deliver predictions for Nations League play-off clash
arts.sum: It's a double-header for Steve Clarke and Co as they bid to maintain their League A status over the next two games

arts.ttl: Steve Clarke mounts Lennon Miller defence over Scotland comments - 'I think that is completely wrong' - Football Scotland
arts.sum: "I think it is wrong for him to be criticised for wanting to improve," Clarke said speaking to BBC Scotland Sport. Steve Clarke has poured cold water over the fluster surrounding Lennon Miller's comments about aims to be the 'best' in the Scotland squad.

arts.ttl: Lennon Miller Scotland best player aim put down to 'word vomit' as dad rejects cocky claim
arts.sum: The Motherwell youngster has been in the headlines over his comments and dad Lee has offered his views

arts.ttl: 'Kenny says he's still the main man' -Robertson on Scotland cap target
arts.sum: Captain Andy Robertson will become Scotland's third-highest ever men's cap holder if he plays against Greece on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Robertson eyes Dalglish's Scotland cap record
arts.sum: Scotland captain Andy Robertson has given no consideration to international retirement and has been teasing Sir Kenny Dalglish that he is chasing down his caps record.

arts.ttl: Nations League: Predictions for all 12 games on Thursday
arts.sum: James Mason has looked over all 12 Nations League games taking place on Thursday and picked out a score prediction for each match.

arts.ttl: 'I told him I'm coming' - Robertson eyes Dalglish's Scotland cap record
arts.sum: Scotland captain Andy Robertson has given no consideration to international retirement and has been teasing Sir Kenny Dalglish that he is chasing down his caps record.

arts.ttl: Ex-England striker dad backed Hirst's Scotland switch
arts.sum: George Hirst says he has the full backing of his dad, former England striker David, to make his "dream" switch to Steve Clarke's squad.

arts.ttl: Hirst backed by England-cap dad for Scotland switch
arts.sum: New Scotland call-up George Hirst says he has the full backing of his England-capped father to make his "dream" switch to Steve Clarke's squad.

arts.ttl: John Carver tells Lennon Miller Scotland best player claim was a 'mistake' as Scotland lieutenant splits Tartan Army
arts.sum: The Motherwell starlet hyped himself up after receiving his first Scotland call-up going into Thursday's Nations League clash with Greece
